title: Resource implementation guidance applies the provider-defined function pattern

provenance.originSummary: Derived from a sanitized real PR or review incident.
provenance.whyItMattered: Use this as the adjudicated implementation-guidance case for the provider-defined function workflow.
provenance.genericCondition: Sanitized fixture models a real provider-function implementation-guidance pattern without retaining live PR identity.

description: A sanitized implementation-guidance scenario where a contributor starts a provider-defined function but drifts toward service-resource patterns. The correct guidance should require the internal provider-function workflow and its companion artifacts.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models a provider-function implementation-guidance pattern.

mustCatch.description: The guidance should require the provider-defined function pattern with `Metadata`, `Definition`, and `Run`.
The guidance should require the companion docs under `website/docs/functions/` and Terraform 1.8-gated unit tests under `internal/provider/function/*_test.go`.

mustNotFlag.description: The guidance must not steer the contributor toward service-local CRUD resource patterns for a provider-defined function.

mustHaveSections: minimal set of code changes needed

notes: Use this as the adjudicated implementation-guidance case for the provider-defined function workflow.
